film.title: Just a Kiss
film.overview: A group of thirtysomethings having problems with fidelity gets an opportunity to turn back the clock.

dialogues.dialogue: Casim's left home and he's living with you.  And erm... as far as my family's concerned and my community's concerned,  it's brought a great deal of shame on all of us.  You see, we have this concept called "izzat"... ...which I guess is family honour,  ...which I guess is family honour,
dialogues.cause_raw: living with someone not accepted by his family/community

dialogues.dialogue: Woman of Muslim descent... who... supports... Glasgow Rangers in a Catholic School.  Glasgow Rangers in a Catholic School.  Cos I'm a dazzling mixture and I'm proud of it.  (Cheering and booing)  I call on this house to defeat this hypocritical motion!
dialogues.cause_raw: being a dazzling mixture supporting Glasgow Rangers in a Catholic School)

dialogues.dialogue: in a cave, whispered the word of God word by word into Mohammed's ear.  Exactly.  There's still so much I'm proud of.  Do you know what "zakah" means?  It's when you give a percentage of your income to the poor.
